actually nevermind, looks like it tries to kill entire process group which means itself too, which is obviously not great.

parents.subject: LU-15491 mdt: rename lock inversion deadlock

commit.subject: LU-15248 tests: use killall -g to kill racer child processes too
commit.message:
LU-15248 tests: use killall -g to kill racer child processes too

It looks like when you just killall a shell script,
the child pocesses it happened to execute don't get a signal,
so depending on how long they run it might prevent the
subsequent cleanup.

Remove traps from the racer scripts as it's no longer
necessary with killall -g and in majority of the scripts
it was a noop anyway since no backgrounding was taking place.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=racer
Change-Id: I0fdfa9595e8c035f0b863bbeba4484b10a4cf514
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
